studyName: STAMPEED: Whole Genome Association Analysis of Hematopoietic Cell Transplant (HCT) Outcomes

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Unique identifier for each sample

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID

variables.name: ant.excl
variables.description: TRUE for samples that received active drug in clinical trials and recommend exclusion from analysis of delant endpoint (antigenemia)

variables.name: cohort
variables.description: Cohort sample was genotyped in: cohort 1 (c1) or cohort 2 (2a, 2b, 2c)

variables.name: d.age
variables.description: Donor age

variables.name: dayant
variables.description: For delant==0 last observed time before which no event had occurred or until a competing risk occurred. For delant==1 time until event had occurred.

variables.name: daycgvh
variables.description: Days until chronic GVHD or until censoring or a competing risk event

variables.name: daycmv
variables.description: For delcmv==0 last observed time before which no event had occurred or until a competing risk occurred. For delcmv==1 time until event had occurred.

variables.name: daygut2
variables.description: Days until acute GVHD stage 2-4 or until censoring or a competing risk event

variables.name: daygvh2
variables.description: Days until acute GVHD grade 2-4 or until censoring or a competing risk event

variables.name: daygvh2b
variables.description: Days until acute GVHD grade 2b-4 or until censoring or a competing risk event

variables.name: daygvh3
variables.description: Days until acute GVHD grade 3-4 or until censoring or a competing risk event

variables.name: daynrm
variables.description: Days survived without relapse or until censoring or a competing risk event

variables.name: dayrel
variables.description: Days until relapse or until censoring or a competing risk event

variables.name: dayrrm
variables.description: Days survived until relapse related event or until censoring or a competing risk event

variables.name: daysur
variables.description: Days survived or until censoring or a competing risk event

variables.name: delant
variables.description: Any antigenemia (ANT/AG), PCR positive cases vs no. Competing risk of death set to 0.

variables.name: delcgvh
variables.description: Chronic GVHD. One means event and zero means censored or competing risk event.

variables.name: delcmv
variables.description: Any CMV disease (virus in an organ with symptoms) vs no disease. Competing risk of death set to 0.

variables.name: delgut2
variables.description: Acute GVHD gut stage 2-4. One means event and zero means censored or competing risk event.

variables.name: delgvh2
variables.description: Acute GVHD grade 2-4. One means event and zero means censored or competing risk event.

variables.name: delgvh2b
variables.description: Acute GVHD grade 2b-4. One means event and zero means censored or competing risk event.

variables.name: delgvh3
variables.description: Acute GVHD grade 3-4. One means event and zero means censored or competing risk event.

variables.name: delnrm
variables.description: Non-relapse mortality (NRM). One means event and zero means censored or competing risk event.

variables.name: delrel
variables.description: Relapse. One means event and zero means censored or competing risk event.

variables.name: delrrm
variables.description: Relapse mortality (RRM). One means event and zero means censored or competing risk event.

variables.name: delsur
variables.description: Overall survival (OS). One means event and zero means censored or competing risk event.

variables.name: dna.source
variables.description: Source of DNA, either cell line (B-LCL) or blood (Native)

variables.name: dnrExpRel
variables.description: Computed donor recipient relationship from PC-Relate - Deg2 (second-degree relative), Deg2 (third-degree relative), FS (full sibling), Other (relative of unknown relationship), PO (parent offspring), U (unrelated)

variables.name: dnrRel
variables.description: Annotated donor recipient relationship from transplant records confirmed by PC-Relate genetic calculations

variables.name: doncmv
variables.description: Donor sero-postive (+) or sero-negative (-) for CMV

variables.name: dxgroup
variables.description: Recipient disease type - ALL (acute lymphoblastic leukemia), ANL (acute non-lymphoblastic leukemia, primarily acute myeloid leukemia), CLL (chronic lymphocytic leukemia), CML (chronic myeloid leukemia), HD (hodgkin disease), MDS (myelodysplastic syndromes), MM (multiple myeloma), NHL (non-hodgkin's lymphoma)

variables.name: ftom
variables.description: Female donor to male recipient

variables.name: inclgvh2
variables.description: This variable is 1 for patients who did NOT receive Anti-thymocyte globulin (ATG) and post-treatment cytoxan and 0 otherwise.

variables.name: kc
variables.description: Kinship coefficient between recipient and donor when genotypes for both were available calculated using PC-Relate

variables.name: missing.e2.auto
variables.description: Fraction of autosomal genotype calls missing over all autosomal snps with missing.n1 < 0.05

variables.name: n.10.match
variables.description: Number of HLA-A, B, C, DRB1, DQB1 alleles that match between recipient and donor

variables.name: n.16.match
variables.description: Number of HLA-A, B, C, DRB1, DQB1, DQA1, DPB1, DPA1 alleles that match between recipient and donor

variables.name: p.age
variables.description: Recipient age

variables.name: pairID
variables.description: Identifier for each recipient/donor pair where both samples have genotype data. Missing for singletons.

variables.name: patcmv
variables.description: Recipient sero-postive (+) or sero-negative (-) for CMV

variables.name: pbsc
variables.description: One for peripheral blood stem cell (pbsc) donor

variables.name: plate
variables.description: Genotyping plate

variables.name: preptype
variables.description: MyeloAblative (MA) and Non-MyeloAblative (NMA) conditioning prior to transplant

variables.name: riskgrp
variables.description: General classification of risk of relapse/mortality after transplant. The ordering of the categories 1-3 equals low-high risk.

variables.name: tbi900
variables.description: Dose of TBI during conditioning was >= 900 cGy

variables.name: tpID
variables.description: Transplant identifier

variables.name: yeartx
variables.description: Year of transplant

tables.description: The subject phenotype data table includes computed characteristics of each person including HLA alleles and ancestry information.

variables.name: HLA_A_Allele1
variables.description: Historical typing for HLA-A alleles informed by HIBAG imputed HLA-A alleles

variables.name: HLA_A_Allele2
variables.description: Historical typing for HLA-A alleles informed by HIBAG imputed HLA-A alleles

variables.name: HLA_B_Allele1
variables.description: Historical typing for HLA-B alleles informed by HIBAG imputed HLA-B alleles

variables.name: HLA_B_Allele2
variables.description: Historical typing for HLA-B alleles informed by HIBAG imputed HLA-B alleles

variables.name: HLA_C_Allele1
variables.description: Historical typing for HLA-C alleles informed by HIBAG imputed HLA-C alleles

variables.name: HLA_C_Allele2
variables.description: Historical typing for HLA-C alleles informed by HIBAG imputed HLA-C alleles

variables.name: HLA_DPA1_Allele1
variables.description: NGS DPA1 typing for mostly cohort 1 samples and historical typing for mostly cohort 2 samples informed by HIBAG imputed DPA1 alleles

variables.name: HLA_DPA1_Allele2
variables.description: NGS DPA1 typing for mostly cohort 1 samples and historical typing for mostly cohort 2 samples informed by HIBAG imputed DPA1 alleles

variables.name: HLA_DPB1_Allele1
variables.description: NGS DPB1 typing for mostly cohort 1 samples and historical typing for mostly cohort 2 samples informed by HIBAG imputed DPB1 alleles

variables.name: HLA_DPB1_Allele2
variables.description: NGS DPB1 typing for mostly cohort 1 samples and historical typing for mostly cohort 2 samples informed by HIBAG imputed DPB1 alleles

variables.name: HLA_DQA1_Allele1
variables.description: NGS DQA1 typing for mostly cohort 1 samples and historical typing for mostly cohort 2 samples informed by HIBAG imputed DQA1 alleles

variables.name: HLA_DQA1_Allele2
variables.description: NGS DQA1 typing for mostly cohort 1 samples and historical typing for mostly cohort 2 samples informed by HIBAG imputed DQA1 alleles

variables.name: HLA_DQB1_Allele1
variables.description: Historical typing for HLA-DQB1 alleles informed by HIBAG imputed HLA-DQB1 alleles

variables.name: HLA_DQB1_Allele2
variables.description: Historical typing for HLA-DQB1 alleles informed by HIBAG imputed HLA-DQB1 alleles

variables.name: HLA_DRB1_Allele1
variables.description: Historical typing for HLA-DRB1 alleles informed by HIBAG imputed HLA-DRB1 alleles

variables.name: HLA_DRB1_Allele2
variables.description: Historical typing for HLA-DRB1 alleles informed by HIBAG imputed HLA-DRB1 alleles

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID

variables.name: comment.kary
variables.description: Primarily identifying chromosomal anomaly

variables.name: double.donor
variables.description: TRUE to identify donors who donated to more than one recipient

variables.name: filter.X
variables.description: Whether to filter the X chromosome due to abnormal karyotype

variables.name: karyotype
variables.description: Sex chromosome karyotype if abnormal

variables.name: race.mcd
variables.description: Minimum covariance determinant defined genetic analysis group for all samples

variables.name: race.s
variables.description: Self-identified race

variables.name: sex
variables.description: Genetic sex coded as M=male and F=female

tables.description: The subject consent data table contains subject IDs and consent group information.

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by FHCRC IRB

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID

tables.description: This subject sample mapping data table includes a mapping of study subject IDs to sample IDs. Samples are the final preps submitted for genotyping, sequencing, and/or expression data. For example, if one patient (subject ID) gave one sample, and that sample was processed differently to generate 2 sequencing runs, there would be two rows, both using the same subject ID, but having 2 unique sample IDs.

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID
